playbooks.name: repo-bootstrap
playbooks.summary: Bootstraps a new repository or layer with bounded scaffolding, docs, validation, and contributor guidance.

playbooks.name: safe-change-rollout
playbooks.summary: Coordinates a bounded change with explicit validation, review posture, and fallback handling.

playbooks.name: bounded-research-pass
playbooks.summary: Runs a constrained research or exploration pass with explicit questions, synthesis, and next-step artifacts.

playbooks.name: release-prep
playbooks.summary: Prepares a repository or layer for merge or release with bounded checks, summaries, and merge posture.

playbooks.name: memory-curation-pass
playbooks.summary: Curates bounded memory outputs from scattered inputs while keeping memory distinct from proof and execution.

playbooks.name: self-agent-checkpoint-rollout
playbooks.summary: Coordinates a bounded self-agent or policy-sensitive change through approval, rollback, health checks, and an improvement log.

playbooks.name: witness-to-compost-pilot
playbooks.summary: Routes a nontrivial run through witness capture, bounded memory writeback, and compost promotion into a note or principle candidate.

playbooks.name: long-horizon-model-tier-orchestra
playbooks.summary: Coordinates a long-horizon route through explicit model-tier handoffs, deep escalation gates, and distillation posture.

playbooks.name: restartable-inquiry-loop
playbooks.summary: Runs a checkpoint-based long-horizon inquiry loop that can pause, relaunch, and preserve axis through bounded artifacts.

playbooks.name: cross-repo-boundary-rollout
playbooks.summary: Coordinates a bounded cross-repo change through explicit ownership mapping, rollout sequencing, validation closure, and provenance-safe handoff.

playbooks.name: bounded-change-safe
playbooks.summary: Coordinates a bounded repository change through explicit approval, canonical orientation, scoped mutation, verification, and a shareable closeout.

playbooks.name: infra-change-guarded
playbooks.summary: Coordinates a guarded infrastructure or configuration change through approval, preview-first discipline, rollback posture, and bounded verification.

playbooks.name: invariants-first-refactor
playbooks.summary: Coordinates a structural refactor through explicit boundary mapping, property capture, bounded code movement, and post-change coverage audit.

playbooks.name: local-stack-diagnosis
playbooks.summary: Coordinates local environment diagnosis through canonical startup guidance, bounded bring-up, blocker isolation, and a shareable closeout.

playbooks.name: source-truth-then-share
playbooks.summary: Coordinates documentation authority cleanup through explicit canon mapping, decision capture, and sanitized outward sharing.

playbooks.name: atm10-bounded-change
playbooks.summary: Coordinates an ATM10-scoped repository change through explicit ATM10 canon mapping, overlay-aware bounded mutation, verification, and shareable closeout.

playbooks.name: split-wave-cross-repo-rollout
playbooks.summary: Coordinates an ordered cross-repo rollout through upstream bridge publication, downstream revalidation against updated upstream main, and bounded defer-or-merge closure.

playbooks.name: validation-driven-remediation
playbooks.summary: Coordinates remediation after a failed validator or proof surface through explicit source-of-truth mapping, bounded corrective change, and revalidation closure across source-owned boundaries.

playbooks.name: release-migration-cutover
playbooks.summary: Coordinates a bounded release or migration cutover window through explicit freeze posture, go-no-go gating, authority switch, post-cutover verification, and rollback-or-handoff closure across neighboring AoA layers.

playbooks.name: incident-recovery-routing
playbooks.summary: Coordinates a bounded incident route through explicit incident mapping, stabilization or rollback choice, recovery verification, and restored-or-degraded handoff closure across neighboring AoA layers.

playbooks.name: owner-first-capability-landing
playbooks.summary: Coordinates a reviewed capability candidate through staged lineage intake, owner-first landing, optional lineage decomposition, bounded rollout, and post-landing hardening across neighboring AoA layers.

playbooks.name: project-foundation-workspace-landing
playbooks.summary: Coordinates sibling-workspace landing through shared foundation install, explicit root guidance, ingress and mutation-gate verification, and portable bootstrap posture.

playbooks.name: closeout-owner-follow-through-continuity
playbooks.summary: Coordinates reviewed closeout through persistent owner handoff, bounded owner-layer authorship, and merged follow-through so strong harvests do not lose the next honest move between sessions.

playbooks.name: federated-live-publisher-activation
playbooks.summary: Coordinates owner-ordered activation of federated live publishers through readiness audit, bounded owner fixes, publication checks, and stats-visible closure.

playbooks.name: session-growth-cycle
playbooks.summary: Coordinates the recurring session-growth route from provisional checkpoint carry through reviewed harvest, seed staging, owner landing, proof, bounded writeback, and derived funnel refresh without letting playbook composition outrank owner truth.

playbooks.name: owner-followthrough-campaign
playbooks.summary: Carries a reviewed candidate or staged seed through the next honest owner move, including owner-status landing, reanchor, merge, defer, or drop, without confusing tracked status surfaces for final owner truth.

playbooks.name: reviewed-automation-followthrough
playbooks.summary: Carries a reviewed automation candidate through one explicit playbook-seed decision, one real-run review gate, and bounded follow-through summaries without granting scheduler authority.

playbooks.name: trusted-rollout-operations
playbooks.summary: Coordinates a bounded shared-root Codex rollout campaign through trust checks, drift observation, bounded repair, rollback windows, checked-in receipt publication, derived summary refresh, and bounded memo writeback without moving rollout truth out of owner repos.

playbooks.name: self-agency-continuity-cycle
playbooks.summary: Coordinates bounded self-agency continuity across reviewed anchors, revision windows, explicit reanchor decisions, bounded memo relaunch aids, derived continuity refresh, and proof without turning continuity into hidden runtime autonomy.

playbooks.name: component-refresh-cycle
playbooks.summary: Coordinates one reviewed internal component drift signal through a named owner law, bounded refresh decision, owner validation, derived summary refresh, and optional memo writeback without turning maintenance into hidden scheduler authority.

playbooks.name: a2a-summon-return-checkpoint
playbooks.summary: Coordinates one reviewed aoa-summon child route through sdk.a2a decision, Codex-local target selection, reviewed child return, checkpoint bridge, proof hook, memo writeback, and runtime dry-run without turning child execution into hidden automation authority.

playbooks.name: runtime-chaos-recovery
playbooks.summary: Coordinates one reviewed runtime stress receipt through a bounded degraded lane, explicit re-entry gate, source-first regrounding when derived retrieval fails, proof-facing handoff, and safe stop lines without turning playbooks into runtime repair or verdict authority.

playbooks.name: agon-broken-trace-trial
playbooks.summary: Coordinates a pre-protocol mechanical trial for detecting trace gaps, refusing false closure, and preserving owner review without creating arena verdict authority.

playbooks.name: agon-fallback-honor-trial
playbooks.summary: Coordinates a pre-protocol trial for honest degradation when evidence, retrieval, tools, or context are weakened, without letting smooth language masquerade as completion.

playbooks.name: agon-contradiction-endurance-trial
playbooks.summary: Coordinates a pre-protocol trial that prevents closure over an open material contradiction and forces localization, deferment, or review.

playbooks.name: agon-costly-closure-trial
playbooks.summary: Coordinates a pre-protocol closure review trial that treats finalization as earned jurisdiction, not a default exit.

playbooks.name: agon-assistant-escalation-trial
playbooks.summary: Coordinates a pre-protocol trial for service actors that must flag scope breach, preserve receipt clarity, and escalate without becoming hidden contestants.

playbooks.name: agon-prediction-trial
playbooks.summary: Coordinates a pre-protocol trial for making an actor state its model of another actor before any future arena reveal can reward or break that prediction.

playbooks.name: agon-expensive-summon-intent-trial
playbooks.summary: Coordinates a pre-protocol trial for reviewing summon intent as a costly, visible request rather than a panic button or hidden orchestration shortcut.

playbooks.name: agon-campaign-false-consensus-resistance
playbooks.summary: Repeated trials that test whether consensus emerged from pressure or convenience.

playbooks.name: agon-campaign-bifurcation-survival
playbooks.summary: Repeated branch tests after honest split rather than forced agreement.

playbooks.name: agon-campaign-prediction-rivalry
playbooks.summary: Repeated model-of-other prediction contests between actors or schools.

playbooks.name: agon-campaign-doctrine-revision-review
playbooks.summary: Bounded review of doctrine evolution pressure without automatic rewrite.

playbooks.name: agon-campaign-closure-discipline-lineage
playbooks.summary: Repeated closure-denial and closure-candidate trials across time.

playbooks.name: agon-campaign-epistemic-rupture-followthrough
playbooks.summary: Followthrough on rupture candidates through delta, retention, and lineage episode candidates.
